name: Hong Gil-dong
headline: Senior Platform Engineer
summary: Platform engineer focused on developer productivity, cloud infrastructure, and service reliability at scale.

bullets: Standardized infrastructure provisioning across environments with Terraform modules and guardrails.
Operated multi-service Kubernetes clusters and improved deployment safety with progressive rollout patterns.
Built internal platform tooling that shortened service onboarding time for application teams.
Improved CI/CD reliability and observability for backend and data workloads.
Defined monitoring baselines and runbook patterns for on-call rotations.

projects.name: Service Bootstrap Platform
projects.subtitle: Golden path for internal engineering teams
bullets: Created reusable templates for deployment, secret management, and observability setup.
Documented platform standards and operational checklists for new service teams.
